english: stern (of a ship) / rear / tail (of a vehicle or aircraft)
notes: Refers to the back end of a ship, car, or aircraft. The plural 'Hecks' is used for vehicles; 'Hecke' is rarer and more nautical.

sentences.german: Das Heck des Schiffes tauchte langsam ins Wasser.
sentences.english: The stern of the ship slowly sank into the water.

sentences.german: Am Heck des Autos war ein großer Kratzer.
sentences.english: There was a big scratch on the rear of the car.
